data.current_description: Mark items as backordered or discontinued
data.description_suggestion: Updates the availability status of items within a specific order. Allows marking items as backordered or discontinued to communicate inventory changes to retailers. Requires the order ID and item availability details in the request body. Returns the updated order with modified item availability statuses. This operation affects order fulfillment workflows and may trigger retailer notifications.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague and lack critical details. Added specificity about the order context, input requirements, return value, and operational side effects to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Accept an order and transition to PROCESSING state
data.description_suggestion: Accepts a pending order and transitions it to PROCESSING state. Requires the order_id parameter. Returns the updated Order object reflecting the new PROCESSING status. This operation confirms the brand's intent to fulfill the order and triggers downstream fulfillment workflows. Only applicable to orders in PENDING state.
data.reasoning: Description mentions state transition but lacks context about preconditions, return value, and operational consequences.
